properties.displayName: Enforce Azure Kubernetes Services (AKS) Workload Identity
properties.description: Audits or denies Azure Kubernetes Services (AKS) clusters that do not have Workload Identity enabled. Workload Identity allows pods to authenticate to Azure services using federated credentials via the OpenID Connect (OIDC) token projection, eliminating the need to store secrets or connection strings.

metadata.changeReason: Standardized metadata for governance traceability and consistent policy review context.
metadata.complianceIntent: Enforce or audit this specific AKS security control according to the assignment effect parameter.

metadata.description: Deny, Audit or Disabled the execution of the Policy
